name: EzyBuddy
description: AI chat assistant that understands any webpage — summarize, ask questions, and get smart answers, all offline.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; object-src 'none'; connect-src 'self' https://huggingface.co https://raw.githubusercontent.com;
